languages.text: {n}Нунциус, своим ликом напоминая о неизбежном финале, смотрит на вас пустыми глазницами.{/n}
{n}Nuncius, his countenance a reminder of the inevitable end, stares at you with his empty eye sockets.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Нунциус, своим ликом напоминая о неизбежном финале, смотрит на вас пустыми глазницами.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius, his countenance a reminder of the inevitable end, stares at you with his empty eye sockets.{/n}
{n}Nuncius, his countenance a reminder of the inevitable end, stares at you with his empty eye sockets.{/n}
{n}Nuncius, his countenance a reminder of the inevitable end, stares at you with his empty eye sockets.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius, cuyo semblante es un recordatorio del final inevitable, te observa con sus cuencas oculares vacías.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius, his countenance a reminder of the inevitable end, stares at you with his empty eye sockets.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius, cuyo semblante es un recordatorio del final inevitable, te observa con sus cuencas oculares vacías.{/n}

languages.text: {n}努恩修斯用空洞的眼窝凝视着你，他的面容像是在提醒你某种不可避免的终局。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius, his countenance a reminder of the inevitable end, stares at you with his empty eye sockets.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}努恩修斯用空洞的眼窝凝视着你，他的面容像是在提醒你某种不可避免的终局。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius, dont la contenance vous rappelle l'inéluctabilité de la fin, vous fixe de ses orbites vides.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius, his countenance a reminder of the inevitable end, stares at you with his empty eye sockets.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius, dont la contenance vous rappelle l'inéluctabilité de la fin, vous fixe de ses orbites vides.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius, dessen Miene dich an das unausweichliche Ende erinnert, starrt dich mit seinen leeren Augenhöhlen an.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius, his countenance a reminder of the inevitable end, stares at you with his empty eye sockets.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius, dessen Miene dich an das unausweichliche Ende erinnert, starrt dich mit seinen leeren Augenhöhlen an.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ヌンシウスは、その表情から避けられない終わりを感じさせ、虚ろな眼窩であなたを見つめている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius, his countenance a reminder of the inevitable end, stares at you with his empty eye sockets.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yüz ifadesi kaçınılmaz sonu hatırlatan Nuncius, boş göz çukurlarıyla sana bakıyor.{/n}
